## Problem

What founder workflow or user pain is not handled well today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want Pulse to support.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user impact or business value.

## Scope

- Affected areas:
- Any API or schema changes:
- Any UI changes:

## Alternatives Considered

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Links, mockups, or examples that would help.
